title: hieracium integrifolium subsp. moravicum
intro: Hieracium integrifolium subsp. moravicum is a subspecies of the Hieracium integrifolium plant, commonly known as the rough hawkweed. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. Hieracium integrifolium subsp. moravicum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health.
